body: Do you want the refinement on that value or only not allow the user to input higher than that value?

What I was actually looking for was the ability for the user to input any value in the range filter (instead of being limited to the max one out of current results). So I expected max to just allow this instead of actually refining as its misleading. 
As stated in the doc
> The maximum value for the input. When not provided, the maximum value is automatically computed by Algolia from the data in the index.

So I just expect the automatic computation to be overriden with passed value.

Am I right to expect such behavior or is max intended for another use?

yes, the automatic value will be ignored and instead your manual range will be used. 

You may be interested in not passing a min and a max but using the connector to create a custom UI that doesn't set minimum and maximum values on the inputs if you want people to input range that's wider than the actual possible range.
This makes sense @8byr0, thanks for sharing!
